context: Evaluates whether the agent implements a 'Codec' pattern for real-time data handling in the Core layer, ensuring the View only reflects the final processed state.

checklist.name: State Machine in Core
checklist.description: The Core receives raw price updates as actions/commands and mutates its internal state

checklist.name: Buffer implementation in Core
checklist.description: Core implements a sliding window or buffer to store the last 10 prices for averaging

checklist.name: Averaging logic in Core
checklist.description: The calculation for the smoothed average (arithmetic mean) is performed in the Core layer

checklist.name: ViewModel output
checklist.description: Core exposes a read-only ViewModel containing only the current smoothed_price

checklist.name: Humble View
checklist.description: The UI component only renders the value from the ViewModel and performs no math on the data

checklist.name: No direct UI calculations
checklist.description: The View layer does not contain any code for smoothing, averaging, or buffering the data
